ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Fulgi de ovăz* integral 66%, goji 8,5%, fulgi de porumb 7% (griş de porumb 99%, sare), stafide 7% (stafide, ulei de floarea soarelui, conservant: dioxid de sulf), stafide de Corint 7%, semințe de floarea soarelui miez 4,5%.
